title: Elytra Cancel
description: Allows canceling elytra flight mid-air by sneaking
body:
**Elytra Cancel** is a small mod that adds the ability to stop Elytra flight mid-air by activating sneaking/crouching! This can be very useful if you want to cancel your momentum without spinning around a bunch mid-air, or if you want to stop your Elytra's durability from draining due to being open whilst in water!

Mod requested by Nekomaster1000 for the Resurvival modpack!
